SENTENSE.VALUE: This skill can be used while moving.
This skill can be used while moving.
This skill can be used while moving
Reduces one's attack but increases accuracy, attack speed and absorbs damage effect
This skill can be used while moving
If the opponent's eyesight is 100%, it will be reduced by 22 ~ 10%
Cast link skills to opponent that has taken the skill effect.
Cast link skills to opponent that has taken the skill effect.
Cast link skills to opponent that has taken the skill effect.
This skill can be used while moving.
This skill can be used while moving.
Increases the evasion rate of the user when equipped with a bow.
Shoots arrows in the sky creating a rain of arrows against multiple targets.
Increases the evasion rate of party members.
Channels the archers' combined energy wave into the arrows to create a massive amount of damage against your enemies.
Delivers a rapid triple-arrow attack against the enemy.
Attacks multiple targets with a rain of asteroids.
Delivers an attack that slow down and reduce the movement and accuracy of your enemies.
Attacks by hitting the weak spot of the enemy causing them to slow down in movement.
Shoots multiple arrows in all directions while performing a dance.
Use bloody arrow to attack the target with fast shot speed by aiming to the sky.
Rapidly attack 4 times with creating several illusion around the enemy.
Shot the 10 arrows toward the target (But only one arrow is real).
Jump up in the air and fire indiscriminately to enemies in the range
Attack with the powers of fury spirits near by
Fires numerous arrows three times to attack
Fires crescent shape arrow to attack
Thrust the hearts of target and the near by enemies.
Shoots arrow in the ground to create soaring arrow and attack surrounding enemies
Shot a dozens arrow on the sitting position to attack
Shot 5 energy arrow continuusly on the sitting position
Creates and shoots an energy wave-charged arrow to the enemy.
Smashes the enemy using the bow.
Delivers a two-hit combo by smashing the bow and performing a roundhouse kick against the enemy.
The enhanced version of a Force Shot which delivers greater damage against the enemy.
Disables the enemy's movement by shooting an energy wave- charged arrow.
Releases an energy wave-charged arrow to damage a target and the enemies surrounding it.
Harnesses the power of tigers to shoot a powerful energy-charged arrow.
Increases the amount of damages inflicted when using bows.
Shoots an energy wave-charged arrow that inflicts massive damage through the power of the Phoenix.
Anger shot with thunder that stuns the target temporarily.
Attack with three arrows into one spot. It causes the great damage and lowers regeneration
Attack enemies in target area by a wave created by the swing of the bow.
Attacks enemy along with Blue Dragon.
Fire with force of Blue Dragon
Leap with the power of dragon to attack surrounding targets on the ground
Fires arrow upward underneath the enemy to attack
Shape a huge arrow and fire to attack
Attack enemy with a Tornado created by 100 Ghosts
Concentrate energy to the bow and create 3 red cobras to shoot enemy in the front
Shot arrow to create tornado and strike enemy
Jump to summon 4 flame soul and shot fire arrow to enemy
Attack enemy's heart using some energies
Infuses the User's blood to the arrows to amplify the damage inflicted to enemies.
Increase the range of attack of arrows. (There is a high possibility that the arrow can be miss from the target)
Shoots an arrow that absorbs the HP of the target.
Attack enemy with the energy storm
Attacks the enemy by shooting a soul energy-charged arrow.
Use the Earth's powers to amplify the damage done against enemies.
Attacks mulitple enemy targets surrounding the archer with 90 degree arrow attacks.
Releases an energy blast to the ground creating a maelstrom of sand and rocks to damage the enemies.
Distorts the balance of time and space causing the surrounding targets to twist and be inflicted by an area damage.
Shoots an arrow that launches at light speed.
Releases a destructive wave of energy causing all enemies surrounding the player to receive double damage.
Shoots the target using chi arrow that can temporarily stun enemies.
Focus energy to the front of the bow, rotate one's body and attack enemy around
Input energy into bow and shoot enemies with bundle of energy arrows
Fires numerous energy arrows to attack
Fires an energy sphere that fires energy arrows in 360 degrees to attack
Shoots arrow in the sky and condense the energy to create explosion and attack enemy with various arrows
Jump and shot powerful arrow to split the ground
Jump and create bagua energy to shot 8 energy arrow to attack
Focus one's energy and increase acquired EXP & CP Recovery rate
Increases the accuracy of one's character.
Increases the amount of damage inflicted by bows and arrows.
Increases the speed of movement but decreases accuracy and evasion.
Attack is increased while evasion & moving speed is decreased for a certain time
Embeds a fire property to the arrow's tip.
Shoots an arrow that pierces throught the target's spirit causing a decrease in the regeneration of its HP, MP, and SP.
Inherits the power of Venia the Methlan to increase Defense and Evasion temporarily.
Shoot arrow to enemy's foot and create powerful explosion to attack
Shoot arrow to enemy's foot and create powerful explosion to attack
Shoot arrow to enemy's foot and create powerful explosion to attack
Shoot arrow to enemy's foot and create powerful explosion to attack
Shoot arrow to enemy's foot and create powerful explosion to attack
This skill is normal effect, so buff clear effect doesn't apply.
This skill is normal effect, so buff clear effect doesn't apply.

It decreases moving speed of party and build a divine shield againt next damages.The shield will absorb a pure damage of skill, though, the HP of it will be dropped off along with the damages received. It will be removed when the HP of shield is over.This

Create a protection barrier for party members that slows movement speed. Protection barrier absorption is not related to defense and resistance value. This skill can be used while moving, and can't be removed by "remove buff effect".
Repelled far from Sonya and Lose HP maximum 30%
Potion cannot be used for certain time and the attack range decreases greatly
HP decreases in every 2 seconds for certain duration and Moving Speed Decrease
HP falls greatly and dragged away by Sonya
Moving Speed decreases greatly and HP decreases in every 2 seconds for certain duration
All buffs are cancelled and trapped for certain duration.
Pick up Rare item of item kinds
PET Pick up medicines of item kind
Meledakkan tenaga dalam untuk menyingkirkan musuh yang ada di sekitar dalam jangkauan 10~20M.
Attack Rate will be temporarily increased including Party members.
Accuracy and Attack Speed will be temporarily increased including Party members.
Skill Delay will be temporarily decreased including Party members.
HP will be temporarily increased and Melee and Magic damage will be absorbed including Party members.
Archer's sub skill is the 'CP Break'. Both the main and sub skills are combined into special skills which can be categorized as physical and magical and can deal damage to enemies.
Move with 1 party member to the target point.
Numbers of target here show the maximum number, and they will be same as the multi skill's target number casted together.
Numbers of target here show the maximum number, and they will be same as the multi skill's target number casted together.
Numbers of target here show the maximum number, and they will be same as the multi skill's target number casted together.

Only happens when failed to reflect damage
Reflect the attacker's stun effect (doesn't reflect the damage).
Reflect the "can't use skills", "buffs removed", and "can't use potion" status (doesn't reflect damage).
Reflects all the attackers' damage and skill effects
For 4 seconds, Enemy's Attack Speed -20% ~ -40%, Evasion Change Rate reduced by -35 ~ -70 and 100% pull the enemy towards us with 200 speed.
Fires acid to deal continuous damage on target
Fires sticky liquid to slow the target down
Fires tearbomb to deal continuous damage and decrease attack power.
Deals continuous damage with toxic chemical
Produce poisonous mist to deal continuous damage
Fires radiation to deal continuous damage
Makes target very easy to receive damage.
Created nerve spasm to deal continuous damage
Weaken resistance and deals continuous damage
Hallucinate the target and deals damage
Slows the movement while dealing continuous damage.
Fires flare to deal damage and decrease the distance to target
Corrode equipments to decrease attack power and defense
Attack with chemical reaction to a target
Throw poisonous spinning blade to attack
Shoot and explode the chemical bomb to attack
Attack enemy with electric wave that back currents the bionic energy
Shoot chemical munition to surrounding enemies
Create a powerful explosion using chemical material
Create electromagnetic wave and explode it to attack
Lifts all the buffs casted on the enemy while dealing damage.
Forbids enemy to use skills for certain time.
Fires guided missile to enemies vital spot.
Create confusion on enemy to forbid taking potions.
Infects enemy to bacteria to attack.
Attack firing electric field to enemy
Give damage to enemy using strong vibration
Attack with plant created with biotechnology
Arouse unstable bionic wave to weaken enemies rapidly.
Throw bomb to the ground where the enemy stand and explode it so the fragment will attack enemy
Fire a powerful energy on the sitting position
Equip telescope to extend the shooting range
Summon C Robot to help create coating barrier and ignore incoming damage 1 time. Every 3 levels increase will increase the received target attack by 1.
Summon B Robot to help create coating barrier and ignore incoming damage 1 time. Every 3 levels increase will increase the received target attack by 1.
Summon A Robot to help create coating barrier and ignore incoming damage 1 time. Every 3 levels increase will increase the received target attack by 1.
Launches Plasma Cannon from Saint Satellite.
Fires bullet in high speed rotation to attack
Infect enemies in front with bionic virus to paralyze.
Fire virus to enemy's area and summon death shadow to give damage periodically
Create a cloud in the sky to fire thunderbolt
Jump and create a bomb then fire it to the ground where enemy stand
Attack & accuracy are increased when gun is equipped
Shoot enemy twice in a row
Shoot enemy twice in a row
Shoot enemy by using case shoot
Shoot enemy by using case shoot
Increase character's attack and acquired CP
Inherit the power of Empo the Methlan temporarily and increase Attack Power and Defense.
Moving speed is increased while accuracy and evasion are decreased
MP maximum amount increase %.f%%, SP maximum amount increase %.f%%
Attack increase %.f%%, Defense increase %.f%%, HP maximum amount increase %.f%%
HP, MP, SP Recovery rate increase %.2f%%
HP Recovery amount that gained from the use of skill and potion will increase %.f
Attack increase %.f%%, Defense increase %.f%%, HP maximum amount increase %.f%%

Attack increase %.f%%, Defense increase %.f%%, HP maximum amount increase %.f%%
Acquired EXP is multipled when item used
Attack Increase %.f%%, Defense Increase %.f%% and HP Amount Increase %.f%%
Attack Increase %.f%%, Defense Increase %.f%% and HP Amount Increase %.f%%
Summon brawler friend to give basic damage and decrease attack & defense for 40%
Summon swordsman friend to give basic damage and decrease 12%~20% HP, 2% MP & SP
Summon archer friend to give basic damage and apply stunt effect
Summon shaman friend to give basic damage and increase 70%~100% skill cool time, decrease 20%~40% attack speed, 20% moving speed
Summon scientist friend to give basic damage and remove skill buff effect, decrease skill range for 10~14
Summon trained crow to give basic damage and decrease 10% attack, 10% critical hit & 20% moving speed
Summon trained mouse to give basic damage and decrease 25% attack speed
Summon plant experiment to give basic damage and decrease 20% moving speed, skill range for 10
Summon trained dog to give basic damage and decrease accuracy & evasion for 14~30, 10% HP
Summon tukran's friend to give basic damage and decrease 20% defense, create 20% critical hit
Summon ian's friend to give basic damage and apply anti potion effect
Swing up the concentrated assassin power for explosion. "Eagerness" effect which restores HP and etc. will generated for extra.
Swing up the scythe to attack and decrease the effect of recovery potion.
Pound down on the target and draw close.
Haunted ghosts of scythe will be release to sweep nearby targets.
Detect the enemies in cloaking mode.
Teleport to the target spot and attack.
Absorb the souls of targets to attack and to maximize the HP.
Provoke targets to draw their attack.
Dash while sweeping the dark spirits that control targets.
Separate souls out of targets for temporary to make them vulnerable.
Chain the targets with mark of stigma to transfer the pain and extra damage between them until the mark of stigma lasts.
Apart one's own self from the current world to become invincible.
Charge enemies with series of vicious attack.
Create reddish black swirls with a swinging of scythe to attack.
Chain the targets with mark of stigma to transfer the pain and extra damage between them until the mark of stigma lasts.
Teleport to the selected area, then give temporary shock to the target in the area of arrival.
Attacking skill fluttering like a butterfly. Avoids all sorts of attacks and sweep the surrounding enemies at the same time.
With the assassin's smoke screen, attack enemies while pulling down under the surface.
Summon the hungry decedents from the under to tie the enemies and to attack.
Strike scythe in the ground to attack surrounding enemies
Swing up the scythe to attack
Swing up the scythe and pound down the target
Separate the weapon for consecutive stabbing
Slash enemies with separated weapon. Using this skill gives "Eagerness" effect for a certain duration which restores HP and Etc.
Swing wide with combined weapon to create a swirl of blades to sweep the enemies while charging forward.
Shield with illusion to avoid enemy attack and move behind the target at instant.
Surpass the physical limit to shorten the delay time of used skills and increase the attack power.
Rapidly approach target in a rush to slash the target. Level 5 and above will have a significant increase in damage when hitting the first target but will lose the rush effect instead.
Mark the enemies with the stigma that chains them all together and attack any one of them to deal damages to all of them.
Appear at the targeted area with the smoke screen and attack the enemies.
Provoke all the nearby enemies to target oneself.
Hit the target area with blood lightning
Shift one's shape into a vending machine to get out of danger
Attack the target from the air. If the skill has been successfully used then the 'Sequel Plan' skill is actuated and all the skill delay time will be shortened.
Hid oneself. Using a skill, attacking and running will stop the cloaking effect.
Combine the weapon and sweep the surrounding.
Casts illusion spell to attract the target and make them dance
Teleport to a target area with the party members and hide everyone
For a faster defeat, slow down the moving speed and the attack of targets and increase one's attack power.
Teleport to a target to attack and hide. In a party, party member will be teleported together.
Rapidly approach a target and attack their mobility. If a target is on amount then it will be forced off.
Pull surrounding targets and explode the force of Assassin.
Open the separated weapon wide and seep the surrounding enemies.
Throw Dual Spear to target and attack enemy in the fan shape area
Charge in upon the enemy and attack
Slash dual spear side by side and attack continuosly
Make target bleeding continuously with blood poisoning. sing this skill gives "Eagerness" effect for a certain duration which restores HP and Etc.
Shoot out artificial assassin fire to attack a target and the others in between.
Switch self and a target by teleportation to attack the surroundings. With this skill (technique), you can switch your position with other player after level 5.
Disguise instantly to trick enemies not to attack
Create toxic storm to push away and intoxicate enemies continuously.
Surround the enemies with heat and dismiss all the favorable buffs and slows them down.
Intoxicate the enemy body to reduce the HP and intoxicate them continuously.
Shift shapes of targeted enemies with special assassin skill to cause ill effects on them
Read the plans of surrounding enemies and take advantage. Using this skill will reduce the delay time of currently used skill by 25%
Throw explosive shuriken to attack and damage is dealt according to the ratio of one's max HP and current HP.
Avoid enemy attacks by hiding oneself in the smoke
Teleport to a target location to attack enemies with fire spears.
Spray the shape shifting poison to damage enemies.
Unbalance the inner force of enemies to extend the delay time of used skills and reduce the recovery amount using potions.
Explode targeted area to attack enemies and create smoke screen to hid oneself and party members temporarily.
Sacrifice one's own blood to deal greater damage to enemies for certain duration.
Explode the intoxicated bait to attack enemies and de-summon their pets
Take over the central nervous system with assassin spell to control the target.
Summon 8 phantom of throwing knife and attack surrounding enemies
Throw shuriken over enemy's head and create shuriken energy to attack
Rotate shuriken fast to create a surf then throw it to attack
Assassin's basic skill to improve attack
Temporarily inherit the speed of black panther
Extra EXP can be earned as a reward by inhaling the lost souls from hunting mobs for certain duration.
Rise the column of fire from the ground to attack
Assassin's basic skill to improve attack
Rise the column of fire from the ground to attack
Rise the column of fire from the ground to attack
Ascend the fire dragon roaming the hell to attack
Ascend the fire dragon roaming the hell to attack
Ascend the fire dragon roaming the hell to attack
Inhale the souls wandering around the life to receive extra CP when hunting mobs. Plus, CP is recovered naturally in every 2 seconds for certain duration after using this skill.
Shift shape into black panther to charge toward enemy. Defeating an enemy using this skill will boost EXP.
Instantly hide and bite the target to attack. Recovery will occur for certain rate of the damage dealt to enemy. Defeating an enemy using this skill will boost enemy.
Buff applied only when dominating the field. %.f%% Attack Power, %.f%% Defense and %.f%% HP increase. (The values are lowered for school with more students.)
Buff applied only when dominating the field. Moving Speed increase by %.f%% and Skill Delay decrease by %.f%%. (The values are lowered for school with more students.)
When you revived, HP will recovery for %.f%% during 3 Seconds. (This buff can only be applied to user that participating in Tyranny).
Reward Buff for the participated students of School dominated Power Plant. Rare item drop rate increase.
Reward Buff for the participated students of School dominated Power Plant. Monster item drop rate increase.
Reward Buff for the School dominated Power Plant. EXP acquired from hunting monster increased by %.f%%.
Reward Buff for the School dominated Power Plant. Attack Power increase by %.f%%.
Reward Buff for the School dominated Power Plant. Defense increase by %.f%%.
Reward Buff for the School dominated Power Plant. HP+MP+SP recovery rate increase by %.2f%%.
Reward Buff for the participated students of School dominated Power Plant. Monster gold drop increase %.f%%.
Reward Buff for the School dominated Power Plant. HP increase by %.f%%.
Reward Buff for the School dominated Power Plant. Moving Speed increase by %.f%%.
Reward Buff for the School dominated Power Plant. Skill Delay decrease by %.f%%.
Reward Buff for the School dominated Power Plant. Trade items from Dispatched Extracurricular Activities Teacher located at the center of Saint Power Plant.
During the buff period, mobs will drop the event items. ¡Ø Buff will run for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
During the buff period, mobs will drop the event items. ¡Ø Buff will run for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
During the buff period, mobs will drop the event items. ¡Ø Buff will run for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
Acquired EXP is multipled when item used
During the buff, appropriate level mobs will drop event item. Buff will last for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
During the buff, appropriate level mobs will drop event item. Buff will last for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
During the buff, appropriate level mobs will drop event item. Buff will last for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
Acquired EXP is multipled when item used
Acquired EXP is multipled when item used
Defense increase %.f%% and Avoid Rate increase %.f
Red Team Flag - HP increase +50%, Moving Speed limited to 30%, Unable to cast skills
Blue Team Flag - HP increase +50%, Moving Speed limited to 30%, Unable to cast skills
Red Team - Moving speed is limited to 80%.
Blue Team - Moving speed is limited to 80%.
Accelerator Effect - 50% reduced authentication time, 50% reduced resurrection time
Accelerator Effect - Attack +10%, Defense +10%, HP Increase +50%
Field`s Blessing - HP 150% increase, MP Recovery rate 8%, SP Recovery rate 10%
For 2 seconds, applies the effect of 5% HP+MP+SP recovery rate, 20~40% movement speed reduction, 10~20% attack speed reduction.
20~60% chance of faint effect, reduce 20~40% movement speed, reduce 5 attack range, and limit opponent's sight by 10%.
For 2 seconds, reduce 10~30% movement speed, detect stealth.
For 2 seconds, reduce 10~25% Attack and Defense.
Places a surprise box that decreases the enemy's evasion by 20~30. The attack has 10~50% of faint effect for 3 seconds.
For 1.5~2 seconds, stun, buff removal, and pulling effect, detect stealth.

Places a clockwork duck that chases and attacks the target. For 1.5 ~ 2 seconds, decreases the target's defense by 20~30% and movement speed by 100%, prevents the target's skill use and 30% skill damage.
Now you can hire animals from Animal Trainer NPC at each Campus and major hunting maps.
Available to summon your animal. This skill can be used while moving.
Recall your animal. (Can¡¯t be used while moving.)
Order your animal to cast Step 1 Skill. This skill can be used while moving.
Order your animal to cast Step 2 Skill. This skill can be used while moving.
Order your animal to cast Step 3 Skill. This skill can be used while moving.
Order your animal to cast Step 4 Skill. This skill can be used while moving.
Order your animal to use ordinary attack to attack the target (Can't be used while moving).
Enhance defense system temporarily by making confusion with cloned character. This skill can be used while moving.
Places a swarm of insects on the ground to attack enemy. Decrease resistance by 10~25 and HP recovery by 0.1~0.2%
Create a hallucination on the area. 10% sight limit, 50~90% movement speed reduction
Creates magic bubbles on the ground to give beneficial buff effects to ally. Increase defense rate by 5~10%, resistance by 10~25, detection, reflect 10~20% damage.

Places magic bubbles on the ground which will attack nearby enemies. Decrease resistance by 10~25, Increase the chance of power attack of magic attack applied to the target by 10~20% and the target will get additional 30% of damages.
Places a magic helper on the ground to give beneficial effects to ally. Increase attack 5~10%, absorb physical damage 5~10%, Abnormal State Prevention, Detection.
Creates magical dices to attack enemy by dropping them from the sky. Remove buff, Dismount.
Places a magic helper on the ground to give beneficial effects to allies. Increase HP+MP+SP change rate 0.1~0.2%, remove debuff, absorb magic damage 5~10%, increase attack speed 10~20%, detection.

Places a magic lightning rod on the ground to attack enemies. Decrease HP recovery rate by 0.1~0.2, 60~80% chance of shock effect. Increase skill delay by 10~20%, unable to use potions for 1~2 seconds.
Buff skill which enables you to trade with a friend who owns a store.
Summon mites for 4 seconds to attack. These mites will stun the enemy.
Kevlar (2-2) for 3.5 seconds, become immune to stuns and unable to use skills effect
Absorption (2-2) for 5 seconds, absorb 40% physical and magical damages
Reflective (2-2) for 5 seconds, reflects 20% physical and magical damages
Additional Perfect Marksmanship skill has been activated
Additional Accelerate skill has been activated
Additional Kevlar skill has been activated
Additional Perfect Marksmanship skill has been activated
Additional Accelerate skill has been activated
Additional Absorption skill has been activated
Summon a friend with Shop ability. Exchanging skill is added, only applies to character who possess this buff. Skill level 9 will increase the summon duration to 70 seconds.
Summon a friend with Bus ability. Skill level 9 will increase the summon duration to 70 seconds.
Additional Mites skill has been activated
Additional Reflective skill has been activated
DEX based skills, and weapon are all changed. This skill can be used while moving. Can return to previous state by unequipping weapon.
POW based skills, and weapon are all changed. This skill can be used while moving. Can return to previous state by unequipping weapon.
INT based skills, and weapon are all changed. This skill can be used while moving. Can return to previous state by unequipping weapon.
Additional Preserve skill has been activated
This skill can be used while moving
Additional Perfect Marksmanship skill has been activated
Additional Accelerate skill has been activated
Additional Kevlar skill has been activated
Additional Perfect Marksmanship skill has been activated
Additional Accelerate skill has been activated
Additional Absorption skill has been activated
By going through passage A, you will arrive in passage B. If there is no exit passage, movement is not possible. Skill level 9 will increase the summon duration by 60 seconds.
By going through passage B, you will arrive in passage A. If there is no exit passage, movement is not possible. Skill level 9 will increase the summon duration by 60 seconds.
After activating this skill, it will stay active until the character moves.
After activating this skill, it will stay active until the character moves.
After activating this skill, it will stay active until the character moves.
Additional Reflective skill has been activated
This skill can be used while moving
Additional Preserve skill has been activated
This skill can be used while moving
This skill will make the enemy unable to move and can't take any damage.
This skill can be used while moving
